_meta.owner_note: TERMS ARE ISHAN'S DECISION. Seeds below exist only to demonstrate format. Expand each channel to 8-15 structural terms (geography, institutions, doctrine, chokepoints). Every term must be defensible in an interview: 'why this, why not that'. Document rationale in methodology.md section 2. Set frozen_on (YYYY-MM-DD) at launch; after freezing, any change goes in the methodology.md changelog.
_meta.ex_ante_rule: No retrospective event names (Galwan, Pulwama, Balakot, Sindoor, Kargil, Uri, 26/11...). Enforced by tests/test_dictionaries.py. Spikes at those events must be DETECTED by structural terms, not baked in.
